title: Ferreries Craft and Agri-food Market
description: Ferreries holds a craft and agri-food market on Saturday mornings (roughly 9:00 to 13:00) on the Plaça d'Espanya, with cheese, cured meats, honey and local crafts. One of the most carefully curated produce markets in the island's interior. Representative date: Saturday 6 June 2026.
